ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year range */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years the data covers */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the range */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for the region */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., rate, percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data table */,
  "table_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the data table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data table */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data table */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the table was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data used in the report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the report */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report that was published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal the report was published in */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the updates */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the data version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each year range
Range of years the data covers
Unit of measurement for the metric
Type of data (e.g., rate, percentage, count)
Unique identifier for each data table
Date when the table was last updated

Name of the journal the report was published in

Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication
